summary: Iteration 104: Beverage Ordering with Escrow & BEO Batch Runner. Backend: 19/19 tests PASSED (100%). All new features working: Beverage Ordering (12-item catalog, escrow balance checks, finance alerts for insufficient/below-minimum), BEO Batch Runner (day simulation creates 4-6 events simultaneously, time savings calculation, staff scheduling), Labor Efficiency Tracking (scheduled vs actual minutes, efficiency percentages, bottleneck detection).
critical_code_review_comments: Beverage ordering with escrow checks working correctly - deducts from escrow on approved orders
Finance alerts properly triggered when balance drops below minimum ($5000) or insufficient funds
Escrow adjustment endpoint allows credit/debit with transaction logging
Day simulation creates multiple BEOs simultaneously with cascade triggers (schedules, pull sheets)
Time savings calculation uses MANUAL_TIMES from echoai3_roi module for accurate ROI
Labor efficiency tracking calculates variance and efficiency percentage correctly (scheduled/actual * 100)
Bottleneck detection identifies stations with <80% efficiency
seed_data_creation: Escrow account seeded at $50K on first beverage-orders call. Test creates beverage orders, labor entries, and day simulation events.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 104 tested Beverage Ordering with Escrow and BEO Batch Runner. All endpoints working: beverage-orders (catalog, order, escrow, escrow/adjust, orders), beo-batch (run-day-simulation, labor-entry, labor-analytics). Key test data: Escrow starts at $50K with $5K minimum. Day simulation creates events at ~4-6 events/sec. Labor efficiency tracks scheduled vs actual minutes per task/station.

escrow_account: GET /api/beverage-orders/escrow - returns balance, pending, effective_balance - PASSED
POST /api/beverage-orders/escrow/adjust - adjusts balance with credit/debit - PASSED

POST /api/beverage-orders/order - deducts from escrow when sufficient - PASSED
POST /api/beverage-orders/order - returns finance_alert when below minimum - PASSED
POST /api/beverage-orders/order - returns finance_alert and pending_finance when insufficient - PASSED
beo_batch_runner: POST /api/beo-batch/run-day-simulation - returns time_savings with hours_saved - PASSED
POST /api/beo-batch/run-day-simulation - returns day_operations with total_staff_needed - PASSED
labor_efficiency: POST /api/beo-batch/labor-entry - records scheduled vs actual with efficiency calculation - PASSED
POST /api/beo-batch/labor-entry - multiple entries for analytics - PASSED
GET /api/beo-batch/labor-analytics - returns overall_efficiency, by_station, by_task - PASSED

beverage_ordering.finance_alerts: Triggered for insufficient funds or below minimum balance

beo_batch_runner.time_savings: Calculates manual vs echo hours saved

labor_efficiency.tracking: Scheduled vs actual minutes per task/station
